role_summary: the tax consultant provides advisory and compliance support in direct and indirect taxes,  ensuring clients or the organization remain compliant while optimizing tax positions.
responsibilities: • prepare and review income t ax and gst returns   • handle tax computations for individuals and businesses   • assist in tax planning and advisory assignments   • support tax audits, assessments, and notices   • maintain tax documentation and working papers   • stay updated with changes in tax laws and r egulations
qualifications: • qualified chartered accountant   • good understanding of income tax and gst laws   • strong analytical and documentation skills   • client communication and advisory ability
